free_text: Cross sections  of partial photoneutron reactions for
the  115In  nucleus  and  the  neutron  multiplicity
The  joint  analysis  of  data  for  total (g,xn) and
for 115 In in various experiments was  carried  out.
calculated in  the  frame  of  combined photonuclear
reaction  model  new reliable and free from problems

were  evaluated  using   experimental  neutron yield
There was good agreement between 115In(g,xn) reaction
cross  sections  obtained  at  Livermore and Saclay.
However,  since  the  Livermore  cross  section  was
determined in broader  energy  range  (up to 31 MeV,
but at Saclay only up to 24 MeV)  that  was  covered
energy range above B3n threshold of (g,3n) reaction,
that  was  used  as  the source value for evaluation
Data were compiled at the Russia MSU SINP
